steps.prompt: Read analysis/entities/ and identify entities not updated in >7 days. For each entity, use web_search_advanced_exa with type='deep' and additionalQueries (generate 2-3 domain-specific query variations from entity context — ticker, sector, known catalysts). Use outputSchema when extracting structured data (revenue, market cap, recent events). Also use brave_news_search for last 7d news, perplexity_ask for quick factual checks. Update entity files with source tags. Commit with [entity-refresh] prefix.
